file.title: Comprehensive ShakeMap HDF Data File
file.caption: HDF file containing all ShakeMap results.

file.title: Intensity Contours
file.caption: Contours of macroseismic intensity.

file.title: Intensity Contours (Legacy Naming)
file.caption: Contours of macroseismic intensity.

file.title: PGA Contours
file.caption: Contours of GREATER_OF_TWO_HORIZONTAL peak ground acceleration (%g).

file.title: PGV Contours
file.caption: Contours of GREATER_OF_TWO_HORIZONTAL peak ground velocity (cm/s).

file.title: SA(0.3) Contours
file.caption: Contours of GREATER_OF_TWO_HORIZONTAL 5% damped 0.3 sec spectral acceleration (%g).

file.title: SA(1.0) Contours
file.caption: Contours of GREATER_OF_TWO_HORIZONTAL 5% damped 1.0 sec spectral acceleration (%g).

file.title: SA(3.0) Contours
file.caption: Contours of GREATER_OF_TWO_HORIZONTAL 5% damped 3.0 sec spectral acceleration (%g).

file.title: ShakeMap Shape Files
file.caption: Shape Files.

file.title: Supplemental Information
file.caption: ShakeMap processing parameters and map summary information.

file.title: Station List
file.caption: List of ShakeMap input data.

file.title: ESRI Raster Files
file.caption: Data and uncertainty grids in ESRI raster format

file.title: Fault Rupture
file.caption: JSON Representation of Fault Rupture.

file.title: XML Grid
file.caption: XML grid of GREATER_OF_TWO_HORIZONTAL ground motions

file.title: Uncertainty Grid
file.caption: XML grid of GREATER_OF_TWO_HORIZONTAL uncertainties

file.title: Intensity Regression
file.caption: Regression plot of macroseismic intensity.

file.title: PGA Regression
file.caption: Regression plot of peak ground acceleration (%g).

file.title: PGV Regression
file.caption: Regression plot of peak ground velocity (cm/s).

file.title: PSA 0.3 sec Regression
file.caption: Regression plot of 0.3 sec 5% damped pseudo-spectral acceleration(%g).

file.title: PSA 1.0 sec Regression
file.caption: Regression plot of 1.0 sec 5% damped pseudo-spectral acceleration(%g).

file.title: PSA 3.0 sec Regression
file.caption: Regression plot of 3.0 sec 5% damped pseudo-spectral acceleration(%g).

file.title: Attenuation Curves
file.caption: Nominal attenuation curves

file.title: Intensity Map
file.caption: Map of macroseismic intensity.

file.title: Intensity Thumbnail
file.caption: Thumbnail of intensity map.

file.title: Intensity Overlay and World File
file.caption: Macroseismic intensity rendered as a PNG overlay and associated world file

file.title: PGA Map
file.caption: Map of PGA.

file.title: PGV Map
file.caption: Map of PGV.

file.title: PSA0P3 Map
file.caption: Map of SA(0.3).

file.title: PSA1P0 Map
file.caption: Map of SA(1.0).

file.title: PSA3P0 Map
file.caption: Map of SA(3.0).
